name: Fish Audio Realtime
description: Low-latency Fish Audio speech provider for OpenClaw, using the WebSocket TTS Live endpoint with HTTP fallback. Targeted at real-time voice channel conversation in Discord (streaming Talk mode).

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Fish Audio API key from https://fish.audio/account/api

voiceId.label: Voice ID
voiceId.help: Reference ID of the Fish Audio voice. Find via /voice list or fish.audio.

model.label: Model
model.help: TTS model: s2-pro (default, higher quality) or s1.

latency.label: Latency mode
latency.help: low (default), balanced, or normal. low is recommended for real-time voice channels.

transport.label: Transport
transport.help: auto (default; WebSocket Live, fall back to HTTP), websocket, or http.

voiceId.description: Reference ID of the voice to use
